meaning: adj.与水面齐平的,被浪冲打的
examples: This is a company that is awash with cash.
For example, in the case of rape women were once too embarrassed to report the crime to a male dominated police force that was awash with sexist beliefs about women and their position in society.
Now kids are awash in orange and black clothes, face paint and hair dye.
She sometimes writes as though America were awash with role-confused microserfs longing to be self-fulfilled furnace-men.
